attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.UOM_CLASS, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.CONVERSION_RATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.DEFAULT_CONVERSION_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.DISABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.LENGTH, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.WIDTH, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.HEIGHT, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.DIMENSION_UOM, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS,
 (
 select UOM_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS
 minus
 select UOM_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.UOM_CODE = STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.UOM_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_UOM_CONVERSIONS)
